attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	STSIAI.BATCH_ID,
	STSIAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE,
	STSIAI.ACCOUNT_NAME, 
	STSIAI.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID, 
	STSIAI.PARENT_ACCOUNT_VALUE, 
	STSIAI.LOCAL_BALANCESHEET_OWNER_ID, 
	STSIAI.USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
	STSIAI.START_DATE, 
      STSIAI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
	STSIAI.CREATE_DATETIME, 
	STSIAI.ACTION_CODE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_SI_ACCOUNT_INFO STSIAI
WHERE (
	(NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWPF_CNT_PAR
	    WHERE STSIAI.LOCAL_BALANCESHEET_OWNER_ID = NCWPF_CNT_PAR.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID
	    AND NCWPF_CNT_PAR.END_TV_DATE=16000101)
	    AND STSIAI.LOCAL_BALANCESHEET_OWNER_ID IS NOT NULL)
       OR (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM
( SELECT NFAT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV   NFAT WHERE END_TV_DATE = 16000101
		UNION
		  SELECT SSAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE  FROM $$STGDB.ST_SI_ACCOUNT_INFO SSAI
		UNION 
		  SELECT ESAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_ACCOUNT_INFO ESAI) ACCT_ALL
		  WHERE STSIAI.PARENT_ACCOUNT_VALUE = ACCT_ALL.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE)
		    AND STSIAI.PARENT_ACCOUNT_VALUE IS NOT NULL)
      )

SELECT 
TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.RU_BK_PARENT_FIN_ACCT_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE AS START_DATE_ACTIVE,
COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE- INTERVAL '1' DAY)
OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING),
DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_DATE_ACTIVE,
TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_ACCT_START_DATE,
TVOUTPUT.GLOBAL_ACCOUNT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
TVOUTPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
TVOUTPUT.PARENT_ROLE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DATE ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
TVOUTPUT.FINANCIAL_ACCT_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT,  /*  Column added as part of Rel8 */
TVOUTPUT.CONTROLLABLE_ACCOUNT_FLG,  /*   Column added as part of Rel8 */
TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NFAT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE,
TVOUTPUT.EXCLUDE_IT_ALLOCATIONS_FLG  /* Added column in Q1FY11 for IT Allocation Proj*/
FROM
(
SELECT 
BATCH_ID,
BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
RU_BK_PARENT_FIN_ACCT_CODE,
START_TV_DATE,
FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
FINANCIAL_ACCT_START_DATE,
GLOBAL_ACCOUNT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
PARENT_ROLE,
ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
ACTION_CODE,
EXCEPTION_TYPE,
FINANCIAL_ACCT_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT,   /*  Column added as part of Rel8 */
CONTROLLABLE_ACCOUNT_FLG,  /*  Column added as part of Rel8 */
EXCLUDE_IT_ALLOCATIONS_FLG, /* Added column in Q1FY11 for IT Allocation Proj*/
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
			TVINPUT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
			TVINPUT.RU_BK_PARENT_FIN_ACCT_CODE,
			TVINPUT.FINANCIAL_ACCT_START_DATE,
			TVINPUT.GLOBAL_ACCOUNT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
			TVINPUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
	ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) AS ROW_NUM
FROM
(
SELECT 
	MFOM_ACCT.BATCH_ID,
	MFOM_ACCT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
	MFOM_ACCT.RU_BK_PARENT_FIN_ACCT_CODE,
	MFOM_ACCT.START_TV_DATE,
	MFOM_ACCT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
	MFOM_ACCT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
	MFOM_ACCT.FINANCIAL_ACCT_START_DATE,
	MFOM_ACCT.GLOBAL_ACCOUNT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
	MFOM_ACCT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
	MFOM_ACCT.PARENT_ROLE,
	(CASE 
	   WHEN FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE=5 
	              THEN COALESCE(NFAHNTV.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,'Non Expense SSOT Other')
	   /*Added*/
	   WHEN NFAHAT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID ='Asset' AND CAP_ACCT.ACCOUNT_ID IS  NULL
	              THEN 'Unmapped Asset' 
	   WHEN NFAHAT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID='Asset' AND CAP_ACCT.ACCOUNT_ID IS NOT NULL
	              THEN CAP_ACCT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID /* End */
	   ELSE NFAHAT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
	END)   ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
	MFOM_ACCT.ACTION_CODE,
	MFOM_ACCT.EXCEPTION_TYPE,
	NFAHNTV.ACCOUNT_SEQUENCE  as FINANCIAL_ACCT_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT , /*  Column added as part of Rel8 */
	case when NFAHNTV.CONTROLLABLE='C' then 'Y' when NFAHNTV.CONTROLLABLE='NC' then 'N' else '=' end as CONTROLLABLE_ACCOUNT_FLG  /*  Column added as part of Rel8 */
	,Coalesce( NFAHNTV.CENTRALIZED_ALLOCATION_FLAG,'N')  as  EXCLUDE_IT_ALLOCATIONS_FLG /* Added column in Q1FY11 for IT Allocation Proj*/
			FROM(
				SELECT 
				SSAI.BATCH_ID,
				SSAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
				SSAI.PARENT_ACCOUNT_VALUE RU_BK_PARENT_FIN_ACCT_CODE,
				CAST(SSAI.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE) START_TV_DATE, /* Changed it from LAST_UPDATE_DATE to CREATE_DATETIME in R8 */
				CAST(SSAI.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID AS VARCHAR(1)) FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
				SSAI.ACCOUNT_NAME FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
				CAST(SSAI.START_DATE AS DATE) FINANCIAL_ACCT_START_DATE,
				NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY GLOBAL_ACCOUNT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
				SSAI.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
				(CASE WHEN SSAI.PARENT_ACCOUNT_VALUE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) PARENT_ROLE,
				SSAI.ACTION_CODE,
				'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
				FROM
				$$STGDB.ST_SI_ACCOUNT_INFO SSAI LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
				ON SSAI.LOCAL_BALANCESHEET_OWNER_ID = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
				AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE=16000101
				UNION ALL
				SELECT 
				ESAI.BATCH_ID,
				ESAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
				ESAI.PARENT_ACCOUNT_VALUE RU_BK_PARENT_FIN_ACCT_CODE,
				CAST (ESAI.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS DATE) START_TV_DATE,
				CAST(ESAI.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID AS VARCHAR(1)) FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
				ESAI.ACCOUNT_NAME FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
				CAST (ESAI.START_DATE AS DATE) FINANCIAL_ACCT_START_DATE,
				NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY GLOBAL_ACCOUNT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
				ESAI.CREATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
				(CASE WHEN ESAI.PARENT_ACCOUNT_VALUE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS PARENT_ROLE,
				ESAI.ACTION_CODE, 
				ESAI.EXCEPTION_TYPE
				FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_ACCOUNT_INFO ESAI LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_TV NCWP
				ON ESAI.LOCAL_BALANCESHEET_OWNER_ID = NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID 
				AND NCWP.END_TV_DATE=16000101
			)MFOM_ACCT 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	( SELECT  EEAB.DESCRIPTION as ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID ,EEEA.ACCOUNT_ID BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,
	   EEAB.ACCOUNT_SEQUENCE ,  /*  Column added as part of Rel8 */
	   CONTROLLABLE /*  Column added as part of Rel8 */
	   ,CENTRALIZED_ALLOCATION_FLAG  /* Added in Q1FY11 for IT Allocation Proj*/
	FROM
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_ET_EXPENSE_ACCOUNTS EEEA
	,$$ETLVWDB.EL_ET_ACCOUNT_BUCKETS EEAB
	/* ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCT_HIER_NODE_TV NFAHNTV  */ /* commented this Join as part of R8 to update Group Id for incremental SI data  , ACC_CLASS */
	WHERE EEAB.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID = EEEA.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID
	/*AND EEAB.DESCRIPTION=NFAHNTV.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID  
	AND ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 5
	AND END_TV_DT = 16000101  */ /*commented this Join as part of R8 , ACC_CLASS */
	)NFAHNTV
	ON MFOM_ACCT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = NFAHNTV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	(SELECT NFAHNTV.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,ESAT.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID 
	 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCT_HIER_NODE_TV NFAHNTV
	,$$ETLVWDB.EL_SI_ACCOUNT_TYPE ESAT
	WHERE ESAT.ACCOUNT_TYPE_DESC=NFAHNTV.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
	) NFAHAT
	ON MFOM_ACCT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE=NFAHAT.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID
	/* Added */
	LEFT OUTER JOIN
	          ( SELECT 
	            B.ACCOUNT_ID AS  ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
	            SUBSTR(C.ACCOUNT_ID,1,5) AS ACCOUNT_ID
	            FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS A,$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS B,$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS C 
	            WHERE A.CAP_ACCOUNT_ID IN (2,3) 
	            AND B.PARENT_ACCT_ID = A.CAP_ACCOUNT_ID 
	            AND C.PARENT_ACCT_ID = B.CAP_ACCOUNT_ID 
                  GROUP BY 1,2
	          ) CAP_ACCT
	ON MFOM_ACCT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE =CAP_ACCT.ACCOUNT_ID /* End */
UNION ALL
SELECT 
-999 BATCH_ID,
NFAT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
NFAT.RU_BK_PARENT_FIN_ACCT_CODE,
NFAT.START_TV_DATE,
NFAT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE as FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE,
NFAT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION,
NFAT.FINANCIAL_ACCT_START_DATE,
NFAT.GLOBAL_ACCOUNT_OWNER_PARTY_KEY,
NFAT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
NFAT.PARENT_ROLE,
NFAT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
'X' ACTION_CODE,
'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
NFAT.FINANCIAL_ACCT_DISPLAY_SEQ_INT , /* Column added as part of Rel8 */
NFAT.CONTROLLABLE_ACCOUNT_FLG , /* Column added as part of Rel8 */ 
NFAT.EXCLUDE_IT_ALLOCATIONS_FLG /* Added column in Q1FY11 for IT Allocation Proj*/
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFAT
WHERE NFAT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE IN 
(SELECT SSAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM $$STGDB.ST_SI_ACCOUNT_INFO SSAI
UNION
SELECT EXSAI.ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_SI_ACCOUNT_INFO EXSAI)
AND NFAT.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
) TVINPUT
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,TVINPUT.START_TV_DATE
ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
)TVOUTPUT
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFAT
ON TVOUTPUT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = NFAT.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE
AND NFAT.END_TV_DATE = 16000101
WHERE TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
